nasb.text: and He Himself is the propitiation for our sins; and not for ours only, but also for those of the whole world.

esv.text: He is the propitiation for our sins, and not for ours only but also for the sins of the whole world.

cnv.text: 他為我們的罪作了贖罪祭，不僅為我們的罪，也為全人類的罪。

ccb.text: 祂为我们的罪作了赎罪祭，不只是为我们的罪，也是为全人类的罪。

csbs.text: 他自己为我们的罪孽做了平息祭，不仅是为我们的罪，也是为全世界的罪。
